# Search engine crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /admin/

# AI search crawlers — welcome (search/citation bots)
User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
User-agent: ClaudeBot
User-agent: PerplexityBot
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /admin/

# OpenAI training crawler — disallow while allowing the search bot above
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://petararsic.rs/sitemap.xml
